subcodes.title: Du’a’ ‘ala’n-Nafyi’n-Nafy
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I and all things bear witness unto Thee that Thou didst create all things unto Him, that there is none other God but Thee, alone, without peer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاشهدنک و کل شیء بما قد خلقت کل شیء له علی انه لا اله الا انت وحدک لا شریک لک
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
